name: Louies Liquor II & Check Cashing
description_short: Louies Liquor II & Check Cashing is a North Hollywood, CA convenience store and financial services location offering check cashing, money orders, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Louies Liquor Store II is a long-standing convenience retail location situated at 13360 Sherman Way in North Hollywood, California. The business operates as a hybrid liquor store and check-cashing service provider, serving the local community with extended operating hours throughout the week. The company maintains a physical storefront presence with direct customer access via phone and online directions.

The company offers check cashing as a primary financial service, supplemented by money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment capabilities. These services are typical of neighborhood check-cashing operations that serve unbanked and underbanked populations who may lack traditional banking access or prefer cash-based transactions. The business integrates these financial services within a liquor retail model, creating a one-stop convenience destination.

Louies Liquor II distinguishes itself through extended weekday and weekend hours, opening as early as 7:00 AM on weekdays and remaining open until midnight on Friday and Saturday nights. The established brand presence (indicated by the "II" designation and maintained website) suggests multi-location operations and operational stability within the North Hollywood community.

As a check-cashing service, the company serves consumers who need immediate cash access without bank accounts, though specific fee structures, maximum check limits, and service terms are not publicly documented on the available web listing. The business model depends on foot traffic and community familiarity rather than digital-first service delivery.
pros: Extended hours: Open 7 AM-11 PM weekdays and 7 AM-midnight Friday-Saturday for accessibility
Physical convenience location: Integrated with liquor store, one-stop shopping for multiple needs
Established multi-location brand: "II" designation suggests operational experience and reliability
Early opening times: Available from 7 AM on weekdays for morning check cashing needs
Local community presence: Long-standing North Hollywood location with direct phone contact
Multiple financial services: Offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Weekend availability: Open until midnight Friday-Saturday for after-hours access
cons: No transparent fee disclosure: Website does not publish check cashing fees or service rates
Limited digital presence: Primarily listed on Waze/maps with minimal company-controlled online information
No published service terms: Check limits, ID requirements, and processing details unavailable online
Physical-only access: No indication of online or mobile check cashing capabilities
Liquor store association: Primary business model is retail alcohol, financial services appear secondary
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in North Hollywood needing same-day check conversion
Local residents seeking convenient check cashing during extended evening/weekend hours
Customers combining check cashing with regular retail shopping for convenience
Those preferring cash-based transactions over traditional banking relationships
diagnosis: Louies Liquor II is best for North Hollywood residents and unbanked consumers needing quick check cashing with flexible evening hours, though the lack of published fee information and limited online transparency means customers should call (818) 764-7386 to confirm rates and service terms before visiting. The hybrid liquor store model suggests financial services are convenience-based rather than specialized, with no indication of competitive rates or protections typical of dedicated check-cashing specialists.
